nodes.name: 污染
nodes.summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: Plain-flanked rail
nodes.summary: Plain-flanked rail（Plain-flanked rail，学名 Rallus wetmorei），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，常见栖息地包括沼泽，主要威胁包括污染。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It primarily inhabits coastal mangroves and has also been found in emergent vegetation of brackish and saltwater lagoons and marshes

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Its mangrove habitat continues to be destroyed by development for tourism and what remains is also threatened by domestic and industrial pollution
